summary: Phase 2 Features Testing Complete - QR Scanner, Partner Directory, Referral Sharing. All backend APIs working. Frontend features functional with one minor issue.

integration_issues.issue: ClientDashboard doesn't handle location.state from PartnersPage to auto-open merchant payment modal
integration_issues.priority: LOW - workaround exists (use QR scanner directly)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Handle location.state in ClientDashboard to open merchant payment modal when navigated from PartnersPage with payMerchant=true

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core features work, minor navigation flow issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features tested: QR Scanner (html5-qrcode), Partner Directory, Referral Sharing. MoMo payments are in TEST MODE - use /api/payments/test/confirm/{id} to simulate. QR Scanner requires camera permission which won't work in automated tests.

mocked_apis.MoMo_Payment: BulkClix MoMo Collection - Test mode, use /api/payments/test/confirm to simulate successful payments
mocked_apis.OTP_SMS: BulkClix SMS integration - Test mode, use code 123456 for verification

Partner Directory (/client/partners).Merchant card display: ✅ Shows name, type, cashback rate, QR code
Partner Directory (/client/partners).Merchant detail modal: ✅ Opens on click with full details
Partner Directory (/client/partners).Pay This Merchant button: ⚠️ Navigates but doesn't auto-open payment modal
